text.message: Great game wtf are u talking about

oj trying to talk blue into giving him the win haha
So you can buy a dev

Also I need my sheep to buy the dev

You have 7 points,youre the rob lol
lol you’re more concerned about the city then helping with the devs

Why don’t you just take road now

well its between blue or oj

oj can literally win here and you solo me
